name: Ubuntu Cloud Image (HTTP cloud-init)
description: Deploy an Ubuntu cloud image to bare metal and configure cloud-init to fetch its final configuration from this Rackflow backend over HTTP.

ubuntu_release.label: Ubuntu release
ubuntu_release.help: Which Ubuntu LTS cloud image to deploy (server cloudimg, amd64).

username.label: Default username
username.help: Primary SSH user to create via cloud-init.

password.label: Default user password
password.help: Password for the default user. You can generate a strong password from the UI.

ssh_public_key.label: SSH public key (optional)
ssh_public_key.help: Optional SSH public key to authorize for the default user.
